_notes: Source: AU Core Procedure (Australian realm). Target: US Core Procedure (US realm). Both make status[MS], code[min=1 MS], subject[MS], performed[x][MS] common. Key differences: US Core adds root error constraint us-core-7 and constrains basedOn reference targets; AU Core uses AU procedure VS binding on code while US Core uses US procedure code VS; AU Core constrains subject/encounter/reasonReference to AU realm profiles; US Core constrains subject to us-core-patient; AU Core marks encounter/reasonCode/reasonReference/bodySite as MS which US Core does not; US Core narrows performed[x] types by excluding Timing; AU Core adds bodySite with AU-specific binding and error constraint.

drifts.description: New root error constraint us-core-7(error) added in target: US Core adds an error-level constraint on Procedure; source AU Core has no root-level constraint.

basedOn reference target constraint added on optional element in target: US Core constrains basedOn to Reference(us-core-careplan|us-core-servicerequest) with no mustSupport; source AU Core does not constrain basedOn. New non-MS reference target constraint added on optional element.

status binding explicitly added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/event-status); source AU Core does not declare a binding on status in its differential (inherits R4 required binding). Binding explicitly re-declared/tightened in target.

code binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/procedure-1) [AU procedure VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-procedure-code) [US procedure codes VS]. Same binding strength (extensible), different realm-specific value sets.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different realm-specific patient profiles.
encounter MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks encounter[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain encounter in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
encounter AU reference target removed: source constrains encounter to au-core-encounter; target US Core does not constrain encounter at all. AU realm-specific reference profile removed.

performed[x] types narrowed in target: target US Core restricts to [dateTime, Period, string, Age, Range] excluding Timing; source AU Core marks performed[x] as MS with no type restriction (inherits R4 base which includes Timing). Timing type removed in target.
reasonCode MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks reasonCode[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain reasonCode in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
reasonReference MustSupport removed on optional element: source AU Core marks reasonReference[mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain reasonReference. MS removed on optional element.

reasonReference AU reference targets removed: source constrains to [au-core-condition, Observation, au-core-procedure, DocumentReference]; target US Core does not constrain reasonReference at all. AU realm-specific profile references removed.

Source constraint au-core-pro-01(error) on bodySite removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint on bodySite requiring codes from a specific AU hierarchy; US Core does not constrain bodySite.

bodySite binding removed in target: source has extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/body-site-1) [AU body site VS]; target US Core does not constrain bodySite. Source binding absent in target.
